title: TXT Reader
shortDescription: Read and search TXT, LOG, JSON, XML, CSV and Markdown files.
fullDescription:
TXT Reader is a simple text file reader for Android that helps you open and review plain text documents comfortably.

Main features:
- Opens TXT, LOG, JSON, XML, CSV, Markdown, INI, CFG and other text-based files.
- Lets you choose local files or open documents shared from other apps.
- Includes in-file search with highlighted matches.
- Adjusts text size with a zoom control.
- Automatically detects common encodings such as UTF-8, UTF-16, UTF-32, Windows-1252 and ISO-8859-1.
- Keeps a recent files list so you can reopen documents faster.

The app works locally on the device. Selected files are used to display their content and are not uploaded to external servers.
